extract: Marowak (Japanese: ガラガラ Garagara) is a Ground-type Pokémon introduced in Generation I. It evolves from Cubone starting at level 28. In Alola, Marowak has a dual-type Fire/Ghost regional form. It evolves from Cubone when leveled up at night starting at level 28. All Cubone in Alola evolve into this form regardless of their origin.
